title: A Puppy-Abuse Case in China, Caught on Video, Prompts Rare Public Protest
summary_full: After a man was filmed torturing dogs, hundreds gathered in a rare demonstration that the police tried to break up. For many, the sit-in was their first civic action.
summary_public: After a man was filmed torturing dogs, hundreds gathered in a rare demonstration that the police tried to break up. For many, the sit-in was their first civic action.
